name: Absorb
description: Use when the user provides a folder, repo URL, or web link to learn from — triggers on /absorb, 'scan this repo', 'import this project', or 'learn from this codebase'. Also fires when migrating knowledge from another workspace or onboarding a reference project.

dry_run.description: Preview what would be absorbed without writing anything

depth.description: How deeply to analyze sources: shallow=README only, normal=key files, deep=full codebase

auto_create_todos.description: Automatically create TODO items from discovered tasks
